sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67839" key="miltwru/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μιλτ-ωρύχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὀρύσσω</etym>) <sense id="n67839.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">digging for</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μίλτος</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:100" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.100</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
